title: oreodaphne coriacea
intro: Oreodaphne coriacea, also known as the Indian boxwood, is a species of evergreen shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Oreodaphne coriacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Oreodaphne coriacea, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
